componentDescription: Renders series mapPoint items at their projected coordinates.

fill.description: Fill color applied to every marker. Overrides item and series colors.

showLabels.description: If true, renders the label of each point next to its marker.

size.description: The size of the markers, as the symbol area in square pixels.

stroke.description: Stroke color applied to every marker.

strokeWidth.description: Stroke width applied to every marker.
